mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals monetary tightening that raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth indicates robust labor market conditions that support corporate earnings and drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns in high payroll growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: Weak industrial production signals deteriorating demand conditions that reduce corporate revenues and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns in low INDPRO environments are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in inflation expectations (CPIAUCSL) and rising interest rates (FEDFUNDS) signal a shift toward disinflationary monetary policy that compresses equity risk premiums and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in co-moving CPI/FEDFUNDS scenarios show positive correlation with the signal (Rank IC < -0.05)

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving supply-side capacity utilization that supports corporate margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns in high INDPRO environments are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) signal strong demand conditions that boost corporate revenues and produce positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in co-moving HOUST/RSAFS scenarios show negative correlation with the signal (Rank IC < 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tight labor market conditions that drive wage inflation and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns in low UNRATE environments are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) and accommodative monetary policy (FEDFUNDS) signals persistent inflationary pressures that force central banks to maintain high rates, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns in co-moving CPI/FEDFUNDS scenarios show positive correlation with the signal (Rank IC < -0.05)
